node.text: Calvin's new car gives him an adrenaline rush every time he steps into it.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "customized shiny finish") on Observation 2 (Score: 0.93)

node.text: Calvin recently got a new car which is a luxury car and a dream come true for him.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "customized shiny finish") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.81)

node.text: Calvin is into cars and enjoys making new and powerful models.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "customized shiny finish") on Observation 3 (Score: 0.74)

node.text: Calvin started shooting a video for his new album in Miami at an awesome beach for epic visuals.
Calvin believes in paying attention to small details to create something extraordinary in his work as an artist.
Calvin had a guitar custom made with an octopus design by his Japanese artist friend, representing his love for art and the sea.
Calvin completed a tour where he performed on a big stage and felt on top of the world.
Calvin is excited about going on a tour and growing his brand.
